source_note: Keeper Rulebook Chapter 3: Characteristics (pp.30-31). Each characteristic is generated by rolling the dice expression and multiplying by 5 to get the full value (rulebook p31: 'any references to a characteristic are to the full value (dice roll multiplied by five)'). STR/CON/DEX/APP/POW roll 3D6; SIZ/INT/EDU roll 2D6+6; Luck rolls 3D6 x5 independently of POW (rulebook p31 Luck: 'When creating an investigator roll 3D6 and multiply by 5 for a Luck score'). Optional generation modes are recorded so guided creation can ask before rolling: rolled in order, rolled pool assignment, point-buy 460, and Quick Fire array.

rolled_pool_assignment.label: Roll the characteristic pool, then assign results

point_buy_460.label: Point-buy characteristics
point_buy_460.source_note: Public 7e character creation guides summarize the optional point-buy method as dividing 460 points among the eight characteristics; the local Keeper Rulebook OCR cache currently only covers the default dice method and low-roll adjustment clearly. Cross-check references used during implementation: Renegade Outplayed character creation guide and RPGames 7e character creation guide.

STR.name: Strength
STR.description: Roll 3D6 and multiply by 5 to generate the Strength characteristic.

CON.name: Constitution
CON.description: Roll 3D6 and multiply by 5 to generate the Constitution characteristic.

SIZ.name: Size
SIZ.description: Roll 2D6+6 and multiply by 5 to generate a Size characteristic.

DEX.description: Roll 3D6 and multiply by 5 to generate a Dexterity characteristic.

APP.name: Appearance
APP.description: Roll 3D6 and multiply by 5 to generate an Appearance characteristic.

INT.description: Roll 2D6+6 and multiply by 5 to generate an Intelligence characteristic.

POW.name: Power
POW.description: Roll 3D6 and multiply by 5 to generate a Power characteristic.

EDU.name: Education
EDU.description: Roll 2D6+6 and multiply by 5 to generate an Education characteristic.

Luck.name: Luck
Luck.description: When creating an investigator roll 3D6 and multiply by 5 for a Luck score.
